badges.description: Preserves, labels, shares, and remembers which tiny envelope contains next season’s abundance.
badges.title: Seed Librarian

badges.description: Transforms rot, scraps, leaves, and questionable buckets into dark civic magic.
badges.title: Compost Goblin

badges.description: Understands hoses, timers, leaks, pressure, and the emotional needs of thirsty plants.
badges.title: Irrigation Whisperer

badges.description: Negotiates trellises, pruning, volunteers, and the annual crisis of too many tomatoes.
badges.title: Tomato Diplomat

badges.description: Creates landing zones for bees, butterflies, hummingbirds, and other tiny garden celebrities.
badges.title: Pollinator Concierge

badges.description: Coaxes fragile starts through germination, transplant shock, hardening off, and existential dread.
badges.title: Seedling Midwife

badges.description: Makes sure abundance becomes meals, gifts, pantry donations, and not just zucchini trauma.
badges.title: Harvest Distribution Agent

badges.description: Keeps track of what worked, what failed, who planted what, and why the squash tunnel became controversial.
badges.title: Garden Gossip Archivist

badges.description: Sees edges, guilds, flows, microclimates, and the possibility of a food forest in every awkward corner.
badges.title: Permaculture Pattern Scout

badges.description: Builds tiny topographies for thyme, sage, oregano, and the dream of Mediterranean drainage.
badges.title: Herb Spiral Initiate

badges.description: Quietly turns garden surplus into nourishment for people who need it.
badges.title: Mutual Aid Produce Fairy
